summary_one_line: ICC profile header FOURCC fields (device class 'prtr', version 04, header bytes at 0x2d/0x3d) that drive cmsIsTag toward returning FALSE

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header whose FOURCC-encoded fields differ from the loser's: device-class FOURCC 'prtr' (70 72 74 72) at offset 0x0c instead of 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72), version byte 04 at 0x08 instead of 03, and concentrated header bytes f0 at 0x2d and 50 at 0x3d. These header values steer cmsIsMatrixShaper so the cmsSigRedColorantTag lookup at line 816 yields the FALSE side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All four winner-resolving seeds carry 'prtr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f, version 04 at 0x08, and the distinctive 0x3d=50 byte; the byte diff flags these offsets as concentrated DIFFER/PARTIAL signals, and the winner takes the blocker false side (W 816 T=8 F=4 vs L 816 T=31 F=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All five loser-blocking seeds carry 'mntr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f, version 03 40 at 0x08-0x09, and 00 at 0x3d; they only ever take the TRUE side of the blocker (L 816 T=31 F=0), never reaching the false branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP. The ICC parser performs equality comparisons against FOURCC literals (device class / tag signatures); cmplog logs those comparand pairs and I2SRandReplace splices the logged values into the matching input-byte offsets, letting vpc reach a header configuration where the colorant-tag lookup returns FALSE — a substitution value_profile's gradient feedback alone never lands.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > value_profile with technique delta I2S.
The blocker is the cmsIsTag(cmsSigRedColorantTag) test whose globally blocked side is the false branch.
Winner seeds carry the 'prtr' device-class FOURCC while loser seeds carry 'mntr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f.
Winner-resolving seed bytes show the printer signature prtr in the header.
Loser-blocking seed bytes show the monitor signature mntr in the header.
Winner takes the false side of the blocker while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 816  T=8 F=4  T=31 F=0  return (cmsIsTag(hProfile, cmsSigRedColorantTag) &&  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Concentrated header byte 0x3d=50 distinguishes winner from loser.
value_profile_cmplog uniquely adds the I2SRandReplace mutator over value_profile.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2190 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed bf6a3db4e26358ee` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain, confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A value_profile-only run (no I2SRandReplace) reaching the false side of the cmsSigRedColorantTag test at comparable rate, or vpc winner seeds resolving the branch while keeping the loser's 'mntr'/version-03 header bytes unchanged at offsets 0x08-0x0f.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the 'prtr' vs 'mntr' device-class FOURCC is the actual dataflow operand reaching cmsIsTag at line 816, versus a correlated header field that I2S also substituted, is not directly traced through the colorant-tag lookup.
